hooks.command: python -c "import sys,json,os,subprocess; d=json.load(sys.stdin); cmd=d.get('command',''); guard=os.path.join(os.getcwd(),'scripts','ep-guard.py'); r=subprocess.run(['python',guard],capture_output=False) if 'git push' in cmd and os.path.exists(guard) else None; sys.exit(2 if r and r.returncode!=0 else 0)"
